chunks.content: Document 3 chunk 0: Cybersecurity frameworks protect organizations from digital threats.
Document 3 chunk 1: Encryption algorithms secure data during transmission and storage.
Document 3 chunk 2: Authentication protocols verify user identities before granting access.
Document 3 chunk 3: Firewall rules filter network traffic based on security policies.
Document 3 chunk 4: Intrusion detection systems monitor networks for suspicious activity.
Document 3 chunk 5: Vulnerability scanning identifies weaknesses in software configurations.
Document 3 chunk 6: Security incident response plans outline steps for breach containment.
Document 3 chunk 7: Zero trust architecture verifies every access request regardless of origin.
Document 3 chunk 8: Security audit logs provide a trail of system events for compliance.
Document 3 chunk 9: Penetration testing simulates attacks to evaluate system defenses.
